message:
test(fenwick): add 40 edge-case tests for FenwickTree (bd-1i1vn)

Cover single-element tree, from_values empty/single, negative deltas,
wrapping arithmetic, set edge cases (zero/same/max), find_prefix
boundaries, resize (zero/grow/shrink), range queries, clone
independence, and panic paths (OOB, size mismatch).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
